meta.description:
The Fellowship of the Ring: Trick-Taking Game is a co-operative card game that plays out over eighteen chapters that lead players through the events of the novel The Fellowship of the Ring. The chapters can be played in any order, but ideally you play them in sequence.

In each chapter, each player takes a different character role — Frodo, Gandalf, Sam, Pippin, Farmer Maggot, etc. — and each character has a condition that must be met in order to pass the chapter and advance in the story. Frodo needs to capture ring cards, for example, while Pippin wants to take as few tricks as possible. As you advance through the chapters, new characters, items, and challenges are introduced to the game.

The deck consists of 37 cards, with one card being set aside as "lost" each hand. Whoever is dealt the One Ring becomes Frodo, then other players choose from the available characters based on their hand. The One Ring is the game's only trump card, but initially rings can't be led until someone plays one off-suit.

In the two-player game, one hand of cards is dealt to a dummy player, with some cards being face up and others face down. This dummy is assigned a character, and one of the human players will play cards for it based on which cards are free to be played.

In the solitaire game, one player plays four hands of face-up cards, with each hand being assigned a character and only a few cards being available at a time. After you play a trick, deal each hand a new card.

If you own The Fellowship of the Ring: Trick-Taking Game, you can add the following characters to this version of the Road Goes Ever On...:
Bilbo (Peculiar), Gandalf (Grey Wizard), Gildor Inglorion, Fatty Bolger, Tom Bombadil, Goldberry, Barliman, Glorfindel, Bill the Pony, Glóin, Arwen, Boromir (Captain of Gondor), Gwaihir, Shadowfax (Lord of Horses), Radagast, Gandalf (Servant of the Secret Fire), Galadriel, and Celeborn.
meta.wiki:
Microbadges

The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game

Contents

Cards: 144
  • 47 main deck cards:
    • 8 Hills suit (1 - 8)
    • 8 Mountains suit (1 - 8)
    • 8 Shadows suit (1 - 8)
    • 8 Forests suit (1 - 8)
    • 5 Rings suit (1 - 5)
    • 10 chapter-specific cards:
      • 1 Old Man Willow card
      • 1 Balrog card
      • 8 Rivers suit (1 - 8)
  • 18 title cards
  • 39 character cards
  • 19 event cards
  • 11 threat cards:
    • 4 Black Riders (1 - 4)
    • 7 threats (1 - 7)
  • 5 curse cards
  • 5 gift cards
Tokens: 5
  • 4 star tokens
  • 1 Rings token

Rulebook: 1

List of Cards

Each card has a small box in the bottom-right corner with the card's number in it. The color of the box determines whether it is used in the game's endless mode, the Road Goes Ever On.

Card No. Box Color Card Type Card Name
1.01 White Title Chapter 1: A Long-Expected Party
1.02 Black Character Frodo (Ring-bearer)
1.03 White Character Bilbo (Peculiar)
1.04 Black Character Gandalf (Grey Wizard)
1.05 White Character Pippin (Fool)
1.06 - 1.13 Black Main Deck 1 - 8 of Hills
1.14 - 1.21 Black Main Deck 1 - 8 of Mountains
1.22 - 1.29 Black Main Deck 1 - 8 of Shadows
1.30 - 1.37 Black Main Deck 1 - 8 of Forests
1.38 - 1.42 Black Main Deck 1 - 5 of Rings
1.43 - 1.46 Black Event Player Reference Card (x4)
1.47 - 1.48 Black Event Reference for 2-Player Game (x2)
2.01 White Title Chapter 2: A Little Delay in the Shire
2.02 White Character Sam (Gardener)
2.03 White Character Merry (Stout Heart)
2.04 - 2.07 White Threat Black Rider 1 - 4
2.08 White Title Chapter 3: The Ring Sets Out
2.09 Black Character Gildor Inglorion (High Elf)
2.10 Black Character Farmer Maggot (Brave)
2.11 White Title Chapter 4: Conspiracy in Crickhollow
2.12 Black Character Fatty Bolger (Cautious)
2.13 White Title Chapter 5: The Old Forest
2.14 White Event Old Man Willow
2.15 White Main Deck 9 of Forests (Old Man Willow)
2.16 Black Character Tom Bombadil (The Master)
2.17 White Title Chapter 6: Fog on the Barrow-downs
2.18 White Event Barrow-wights
2.19 Black Character Goldberry (River's Daughter)
2.20 White Title Chapter 7: At the Sign of the Prancing Pony
2.21 White Character Mr. Underhill (Hidden)
2.22 Black Character Barliman Butterbur (Forgetful)
2.23 White Title Chapter 8: A Knife in the Dark
2.24 White Character Strider (Ranger)
2.25 Black Curse Black Rider (The Black Breath)
2.26 Black Curse The Witch-king (Morgul-knife)
2.27 White Title Chapter 9: Flight to the Ford
2.28 Black Character Glorfindel (Elf-lord)
2.29 Black Character Bill the Pony (Sturdy)
2.30 Black Curse Black Rider (Wraith)
2.31 Black Curse Black Rider (Unseen)
2.32 Black Curse Black Rider (Terror)
2.33 White Event The Nine
2.34 White Title Chapter 10: Recovery in Rivendell
2.35 White [1] Character Elrond (Half-elven)
2.36 Black Character Arwen (The Evenstar)
2.37 Black Character Glóin (Bilbo's Companion)
2.38 Black Character Bilbo Baggins (Stretched)
2.39 White Title Chapter 11: The Council of Elrond
2.40 White Character Aragorn (Heir of Isildur)
2.41 White Character Boromir (Captain of Gondor)
2.42 Black Gift The Sword That Was Broken (Shards of Narsil)
2.43 Black Gift The Horn of Gondor (Heirloom)
2.44 White Title Chapter 12: Delayed in Isengard
2.45 White Event Saruman of Many Colours
2.46 Black Character Gwaihir (Lord of the Wind)
2.47 Black Character Shadowfax (Lord of Horses)
2.48 Black Character Radagast (Brown Wizard)
3.01 White Title Chapter 13: The Ring Goes South
3.02 - 3.08 Black Threat Threat 1 - 7
3.09 White Character Legolas (Mirkwood Elf)
3.10 White Character Gimli (Durin's Folk)
3.11 Black Gift Mithril Shirt (Harder Than Steel)
3.12 White Title Chapter 14: The Mines of Moria
3.13 White Event The Doors of Durin
3.14 White Event Balin's Tomb
3.15 White Event The Long Dark
3.16 White Event The Bridge of Khazad-dûm
3.17 White Character Gandalf, Servant of the Secret Fire (Flame of Anor)
3.18 White Main Deck 5 of Shadows (Balrog)
3.19 White Title Chapter 15: The Leaves of Lothlórien
3.20 White Event Blindfolded
3.21 Black Character Orophin & Rúmil (Galadhrim)
3.22 Black Character Haldir (Marchwarden)
3.23 White Title Chapter 16: The Mirror of Galadriel
3.24 White Event The Mirror
3.25 Black Character Galadriel (Lady of Lothlórien)
3.26 Black Character Celeborn (Lord of Lothlórien)
3.27 White Title Chapter 17: The Great River
3.28 White Event The Anduin
3.29 - 3.36 White Main Deck 1 - 8 of Rivers
3.37 White Title Chapter 18: The Breaking of the Fellowship
3.38 White Event Breaking of the Fellowship
3.39 Gold Character Samwise Gamgee (Loyal / Burdened)
3.40 Gold Character Peregrin Took (Adventurous / Burdened)
3.41 Gold Character Meriadoc Brandybuck (Stout Heart / Burdened)
3.42 Gold Character Aragorn son of Arathorn (Elessar / Burdened)
3.43 Gold Character Boromir son of Denethor (Doomed / Burdened)
3.44 Gold Character Legolas Greenleaf (Son of Thranduil / Burdened)
3.45 Gold Character Gimli son of Glóin (Durin's Folk / Burdened)
3.46 White Event The Road Goes Ever On
3.47 Black Gift Sting (Bilbo's Sword)
3.48 Black Gift Glamdring (Elven Sword)

[1] Elrond was printed as a black box card in early versions of the game. This was an error, as Elrond's objective contradicts Frodo's objective with 1-3 players.

Cross-Compatibility

The following character cards from this game are compatible with The Two Towers: Trick-Taking Game's version of the Road Goes Ever On:
  • 1.03 - Bilbo (Peculiar)
  • 1.04 - Gandalf (Grey Wizard)
  • 2.09 - Gildor Inglorion (High Elf)
  • 2.12 - Fatty Bolger (Cautious)
  • 2.16 - Tom Bombadil (The Master)
  • 2.19 - Goldberry (River's Daughter)
  • 2.22 - Barliaman Butterbur (Forgetful)
  • 2.28 - Glorfindel (Elf-lord)
  • 2.29 - Bill the Pony (Sturdy)
  • 2.36 - Arwen (The Evenstar)
  • 2.37 - Glóin (Bilbo's Companion)
  • 2.41 - Boromir (Captain of Gondor)
  • 2.46 - Gwaihir (Lord of the Wind)
  • 2.47 - Shadowfax (Lord of Horses)
  • 2.48 - Radagast (Brown Wizard)
  • 3.17 - Gandalf, Servant of the Secret Fire (Flame of Anor)
  • 3.25 - Galadriel (Lady of Lothlórien)
  • 3.26 - Celeborn (Lord of Lothlórien)
